channel.title: WOFA — Windows Security Updates
channel.description: Windows cumulative security update feed tracking CVEs, exploited vulnerabilities, and patch details per OS version.

item.title: Windows Server 2012 - April 2026 Security Update (KB5082403)
item.description:
Windows Server 2012 - April 2026 Security Update (KB5082403)

Build: 4.8.4801.0

CVEs addressed: 63

Actively exploited CVEs (1): CVE-2026-32202

KB article
